jsonLd.title: DTDC is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
DTDC invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Ludhiana location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DTDC:
DTDC is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DTDC!
